summary: First-finish smoke test of DivinArte frontend-only React storefront. Verified home, navigation, shop catalog with pagination & filters, add-to-cart, cart drawer, checkout multi-step entry, product detail (gallery/qty/add), login page, blog list, contact form, EUR pt-PT locale, and mobile menu. 24/24 critical checks passed.
passed: Home page loads with Portuguese copy and title 'DivinArte — Cosmética natural artesanal'
Header navigation works for Início, Loja, Sobre, Blog, Contacto
Shop page renders 8 products per page (pagination active)
Add-to-cart from shop card opens cart drawer
Checkout page loads with multi-step form (9 inputs detected) and step-next button works
Product detail page navigation via /produto/:slug works; qty-plus and product-add-to-cart functional
Login page (/conta/login) loads with login-submit testid
Blog list shows 3 articles with /blog/:slug links
EUR prices use pt-PT locale (e.g. '18,90 €') — 10+ samples found
Mobile hamburger (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn') opens menu at 390px viewport
notes: Backend testing skipped per request (frontend-only build). Auth/payment/newsletter/contact are mocked as expected. Deeper coverage (full checkout completion, order success page, cart persistence across reloads, related products, sub-routes under /conta, blog detail bodies) deferred to full QA pass.
